zh.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray是Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray和Margaret Countess of Moray的兒子，於大約1400年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾。他於大約1425年之前與Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1430年8月10日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾福倫德勞特享年31歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾福倫德勞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray是Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray和Margaret Countess of Moray的儿子，于大约1400年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾。他于大约1425年之前与Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1430年8月10日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾福倫德勞特享年31岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾福倫德勞特。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray was born about 1400, in Elginshire, Scotland as the son of Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray and Margaret Countess of Moray. He married Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray before about 1425. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 10 August 1430, in Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 31, and was buried in Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray est né environ 1400, à Elginshire, Écosse, fils de Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray et Margaret Countess of Moray. Il a épousé Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray avant environ 1425. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1430, à Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray wurde um 1400 in Elginshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray und Margaret Countess of Moray geboren. Er hat vor um 1425 Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. August 1430 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray è nato il circa 1400 nel Elginshire, Scotland come figlio di Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray e Margaret Countess of Moray. Lui sposato Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray prima del circa 1425. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1430, nel Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Morayは約1400年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアでThomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of MorayとMargaret Countess of Morayの息子として生まれた。約1425年以前にJanet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1430年8月10日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフレンドラウトで31歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフレンドラウトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray(은)는 대략 1400년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray(와)과 Margaret Countess of Moray의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1425년 이전 Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 8월 10일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 프렌드라그h트에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 프렌드라그h트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Elginshire, Scotland filho de Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray e Margaret Countess of Moray. Ele casou-se com Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray antes aproximadamente 1425. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1430, em Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Frendraught, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray родился около 1400 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray и Margaret Countess of Moray. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet-vic-Alexander Seton of Gordon - Countess of Moray перед около 1425 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 10 августа 1430 г. в местности френдрот, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности френдрот, абирдиншир, Шотландия.
